title: Bharat Milap
actors: Prem Adib, K.B. Athavale, Umakant Desai
plot: Chronicling the upheaval created by Maharani Kekaiyi, on the behest of her maid, Manthra, into coercing her husband, Maharaj Dashrath, to grant her two boons. The first, to let her son, Rajkumar Bharat, be crowned as Ayodhya's Mah...
